verses.text: Restore your brother's strayed beast; hide not yourself. Help. Love acts for the neighbour.
Restore your brother's strayed beast; hide not yourself. Help. Love acts for the neighbour.
Restore your brother's strayed beast; hide not yourself. Help. Love acts for the neighbour.
Restore your brother's strayed beast; hide not yourself. Help. Love acts for the neighbour.
Men and women shall not wear each other's garments. Distinction. God's order is honoured.
Spare the mother bird when taking the young. Mercy. Even to birds, kindness is shown.
Spare the mother bird when taking the young. Mercy. Even to birds, kindness is shown.
Build a battlement on your roof, lest blood come on your house. Safety. Care prevents harm.
Sow not mixed seed; wear not mixed stuff; make fringes. Purity. Separation marks the holy.
Sow not mixed seed; wear not mixed stuff; make fringes. Purity. Separation marks the holy.
Sow not mixed seed; wear not mixed stuff; make fringes. Purity. Separation marks the holy.
Sow not mixed seed; wear not mixed stuff; make fringes. Purity. Separation marks the holy.
A man slanders his bride's purity to her parents. Slander. A false charge is brought.
A man slanders his bride's purity to her parents. Slander. A false charge is brought.
A man slanders his bride's purity to her parents. Slander. A false charge is brought.
A man slanders his bride's purity to her parents. Slander. A false charge is brought.
The tokens vindicate her; the husband is fined and bound. Vindicated. Truth defends the wronged.
The tokens vindicate her; the husband is fined and bound. Vindicated. Truth defends the wronged.
The tokens vindicate her; the husband is fined and bound. Vindicated. Truth defends the wronged.
But if the charge is true, she is stoned. Judged. Sin is not winked at.
But if the charge is true, she is stoned. Judged. Sin is not winked at.
Adulterers, both man and woman, shall die. Adultery. Marriage is guarded.
The betrothed defiled in city or field is judged by circumstance. Justice. Each case is weighed.
The betrothed defiled in city or field is judged by circumstance. Justice. Each case is weighed.
The betrothed defiled in city or field is judged by circumstance. Justice. Each case is weighed.
The betrothed defiled in city or field is judged by circumstance. Justice. Each case is weighed.
The betrothed defiled in city or field is judged by circumstance. Justice. Each case is weighed.
Laws of seduction and forbidden marriage are given. Bounds. God orders conduct.
Laws of seduction and forbidden marriage are given. Bounds. God orders conduct.
